title: The 'Star Wars' Movie Draft
format: A five-host snake draft of the Star Wars universe across seven categories — Movie, Movie You're Cursed With (a curse you draft for someone else), Skywalker Family Member, Hero or Villain, Vehicle, Problematic Character, and Wild Card. The two film categories link out; the rest are the characters, ships, and picks each host took. Round-one seeding: Sean, Mallory, Van, Amanda, Chris.

picks.title: The Empire Strikes Back
picks.note: First overall pick. 'My favorite Star Wars movie — the greatest sequel ever made.'

picks.title: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones
picks.note: Cursed by Mallory, to offset his having Empire.

picks.title: Leia Organa
picks.note: 'Leia as my Skywalker makes the most sense.'

picks.title: Ben Solo / Kylo Ren
picks.note: 'He's both — one of my favorite characters in movies in the last 20 years.'

picks.title: Darth Vader's TIE Advanced x1
picks.note: 'The coolest vehicle after the Millennium Falcon.'

picks.title: Nute Gunray
picks.note: Trade Federation — 'one of the most blatant anti-Asian stereotypes.'

picks.title: Boba Fett
picks.note: 'I cannot believe he lasted this long.'

picks.title: Star Wars
picks.note: Second overall pick. A New Hope — 'it changed movies.'

picks.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
picks.note: Given by Amanda — 'not really a curse. Thank you.'

picks.title: Shmi Skywalker
picks.note: A last-round pivot after C-3PO/R2-D2 fell through — 'the matriarch who allowed us to talk about this at all.'

picks.title: Obi-Wan Kenobi
picks.note: 'I can't believe he fell this far.'

picks.title: X-Wings
picks.note: Took all of them.

picks.title: Jar Jar Binks
picks.note: 'The clear number one draft pick — responsible for the Emperor.'

picks.title: Lightsabers
picks.note: Took every lightsaber, not just one.

picks.title: Return of the Jedi
picks.note: 'Now an underrated movie.' His heart wanted Revenge of the Sith; he took the safer OT pick.

picks.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker
picks.note: Cursed by Sean — 'the strength of Van's slate.' The 'big picture evil movie.'

picks.title: Rey
picks.note: Ruled eligible as a Skywalker — 'she represents a lot' to young fans.

picks.title: Darth Vader
picks.note: Third overall pick — took him here rather than as a Skywalker, pulling Anakin off the board too.

picks.title: Millennium Falcon
picks.note: 'The most iconic thing to me in Star Wars still left on the board.'

picks.title: Emperor Palpatine
picks.note: 'A big-time groomer — a boomer bad boss.'

picks.title: The Force
picks.note: 'The thing that binds the universe together.'

picks.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi
picks.note: 'I was very moved by it — a real opening of the world.'

picks.title: Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace
picks.note: Cursed by Chris — 'the bad movie,' as opposed to the evil one.

picks.title: Han Solo
picks.note: A Skywalker by marriage — 'my entry point into what's exciting about Star Wars.'

picks.title: Yoda
picks.note: 'Does Yoda count as a hero? Yes. That's who I pick.'

picks.title: Speeder bikes
picks.note: The 74-Z from Return of the Jedi — 'my son's favorite part.' Took all of them.

picks.title: Padmé Amidala
picks.note: 'An age-gap romance — endangering her handmaidens.'

picks.title: John Williams
picks.note: 'These movies do not exist without that score.'

picks.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
picks.note: 'The best version of the Disney Star Wars experiment so far.'

picks.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story
picks.note: Cursed by Van, who couldn't bring himself to hand over Revenge of the Sith.

picks.title: Luke Skywalker
picks.note: 'For those first three films, he was just my guy.'

picks.title: Cassian Andor
picks.note: Claimed via Rogue One — 'his introduction is so dope in that movie.'

picks.title: Luke's landspeeder
picks.note: The X-34 from A New Hope — distinct from Amanda's speeder bikes.

picks.title: Jabba the Hutt
picks.note: 'Human trafficker — the man who needs a RICO charge.'

picks.title: The Death Star
picks.note: Took it here, calling it 'more of a weapon / battle station' than a vehicle.

referenced.group: Star Wars, discussed but not drafted
films: Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith

referenced.group: In the orbit of the conversation
